results.rendered_html:
avabodhaka a. Indicating, showing; nijaparākramāvabodhakāni caritāni  Dk. 175. 
— kaḥ
1 The awakener, the sun.
2 A panegyrist, bard.
3 A teacher.
4 Thought, intention; madavabodhakaṃ prakaṭayatā  Dk. 153 ; ˚tvaṃ instruction, guidance, explanation.
